column4: What
column6: Pattern Rules

column3: 'add a booking page' / 'build a checkout flow' / 'how do customers order' / 'order steps' / 'wizard'
column4: 3-step accordion on a single page (Contact -> Event Details -> Review & Book)
column6: One section open at a time via expandedSection state | localStorage form key with 30-min inactivity TTL that clears stale sessions | Phone/email sanitized via cleanPhone/cleanEmail before submit | Signature captured in Step 3 via canvas -> SVG -> base64 | Promo codes + damage waiver + payment method picker all live in Step 3 | NEVER a multi-page route per step — keep it one URL

column3: 'add a calendar' / 'date picker' / 'event date' / 'pick a date' / 'when are they coming'
column4: DROPDOWN year/month/day pickers — NEVER visual-only calendar
column6: Year/month/day dropdowns FIRST | Popover + Calendar allowed as a secondary aid only | Manual prev/next-day arrow buttons (shiftDate helper) for fast nav | Times are Select dropdowns (never inline numeric input) | Earliest bookable date enforced server-side | All dates stored as YYYY-MM-DD strings parsed via date-fns | Holiday check on every date change

column4: localStorage cart + server-side reservations with TTL auto-release
column6: Session ID in localStorage (24h persistence) | POST /api/cart/hold creates inventoryReservation with status=cart | Heartbeat keeps hold alive; cold sessions auto-release ~15 min | /api/cart/release on clear | NO deposit charged until full booking form + payment token POST to /api/orders

column4: Square Web Payments SDK + Stripe BNPL (Affirm, Klarna, Zip, Afterpay)
column6: Square = primary card processor | Stripe = BNPL only (Affirm/Klarna/Zip/Afterpay) | Deposit % from business_settings, never hardcoded | Server's recomputeOrderTotals() is source of truth — never trust client math | Order transitions to confirmed only after depositPaid=true AND signature collected | No partial/retry payments auto-fired | Failed checkout returns user to booking page

column3: 'setup time' / 'turnaround' / 'buffer' / 'how long to set up' / 'same-day flip'
column4: Per-product setupTime integer (minutes) used in availability calc
column6: Generators + Tables/Chairs skip buffer (same-day flip OK) | All inflatables/tents/concessions need buffer | Per-product-per-date overrides via productSetupTimes table | buildVenueTimeSlotsForDate() uses buffer to block overlapping venue slots

column3: 'save as quote' / 'send a quote' / 'resume booking' / 'convert quote' / 'draft order'
column4: Draft has quoteToken UUID; conversion creates NEW order; old draft archived
column6: Resume URL restores cart + form from draft | Line items + orderPackages + bannerThemeId + coupons all copy directly | Archive old draft only AFTER conversion succeeds | Pre-2026-05-24 bug dropped packages/banner on conversion — fixed; agents must not regress this

column4: Order of ops: subtotal -> coupon -> tax; per-customer grants checked first
column6: Per-customer grants checked FIRST (referral, employee), then global promo_codes table | hasPackages=true REJECTS code — promos do NOT stack with packages | Overnight fee not taxed (only subtotal + damageWaiver taxable) | Auto-toggle flash codes (WEEKEND25, WEEKDAY30) flipped server-side via orchestrator | One active coupon per customer at a time — never stacked

column4: Real holidays via Gregorian math; banner shows ONLY on real promo OR real holiday
column6: nthWeekdayOfMonth + lastWeekdayOfMonth + Easter algorithm for moving holidays | getShiftedDates() defaults -1 day delivery, +1 day pickup | Banner active window 00:00-23:59 of actual day only | NEVER use activeDaysBefore/After to creep | NEVER a daily generic look-at-us banner

column4: driverStops table joined to orders; status state machine
column6: Status lifecycle: pending -> in-transit -> arrived -> completed | skipped | autoAttachOrderToTruck() fires on order status=active | Route re-optimizes if event date moves | Skip feature jumps ahead; server auto-restores skipped stops on complete | GPS pings stored in gpsTrackingPings | Load checklist uses customer-facing inflatable number, NOT internal product_id

column3: 'admin order entry' / 'phone order' / 'quick book' / 'quick quote' / 'I want to book it myself'
column4: Two paths with intentional asymmetry — quick-book strips the wizard
column6: Quick-book SKIPS overnight detection, holiday shift, dayBefore flag, signature, setupSurface | Quick-book creates orders with status=pending directly | Customer self-serve signature link sent afterwards if needed | Quick-quote generates PDF via /api/quotes/generate-pdf without payment

column4: Email/phone lookup detects returning customers; resume token restores prior cart
column6: Guest checkout ALWAYS allowed (email-only lookup via cleanEmail) | Loyalty tracked in customers.loyaltyPoints + loyaltyTier | Re-engagement events logged to reactivationLogs | /resume-booking?token=X restores prior cart | NO algorithmic suggested-items — let customer pick

column3: 'what happened to order X' / 'audit trail' / 'who removed that' / 'activity log'
column4: Fire-and-forget recordOrderActivity() helper that NEVER throws
column6: actorFromReq(req) extracts username/email from auth; falls back to system | Common actions: order_updated, pickup_removed, date_moved, discount_applied, payment_refunded | Logged with orderId + orderNumber + action + description + details JSON + performedBy + source | Admin viewer at /dubd43admin/activity | Agents query this BEFORE asking what happened

column4: packages + packageItems + orderPackages tables; recompute expands into virtual line items
column6: Cart UI displays packages separately from line items | recomputeOrderTotals() expands packages into virtual order_items with productId=null + lineNote=from-package-X | Cart shows "Promo codes don't stack with packages" warning | Recompute on submit catches stale bundle math + prevents category-slot bugs

column4: Parallel bannerThemes table + synthetic cart addon with isBannerAddon=true
column6: Joined to order via orderBannerTheme | Cart shows synthetic CartItem with isBannerAddon=true (visible in totals, not sent as product) | Banner fee EXCLUDED from recompute (was wiped pre-2026-05-24) | Design notes captured at checkout; proofApprovedAt + printedAt track production state

column4: Google Places API max 5 review texts; manual import for the rest
column6: Real review_count stored as separate business setting — NEVER claim Places-API count as full count | Manual import accepts paste blocks or CSV (name, text, rating, date) | ReviewCarousel rotates reviews on homepage | gbp-reviews-sync cron worker pulls Places API on schedule

column3: 'add a blog' / 'write a post' / 'blog post' / 'article' / 'content marketing'
column4: blog_posts table + Markdown body + react-markdown renderer
column6: Two dates surfaced: publishedAt (never changes once set) + updatedAt (refreshed on every edit) | Hero = real product photo by default; AI image only on explicit request | JSON-LD BlogPosting schema with Person author + Organization publisher | AI image gen via generateImageBuffer (OpenAI gpt-image-1, Render-only key — don't try locally)

column4: Hand-curated rich content for priority cities + synthetic fallback for long tail
column6: Slug must match canonical (e.g., dade-city 301s to dade-city-fl) | Rich pages get neighborhoods + HOA rules + parks + lot sizes + real local landmarks from photos owner took | Synthetic pages use unique nearby-landmark + top-3-neighborhood + FAQ rotation to stay >=30% unique vs siblings | lastUpdated bumps only on content change

column4: DB templates fired on order status transitions; branded HTML with logo header
column6: Lifecycle triggers: draft->pending (confirmation), pending->confirmed (payment received), confirmed->delivered (all set), balance reminder every 3 days until paid | Templates in quick_emails table with {{ customerName }} {{ orderNumber }} {{ totalAmount }} params | Every send uses branded HTML with hosted logo URL (NOT data: images — Gmail strips) | Logged to emailLogs table | Brevo IP-whitelisted (Render only) | Opt-out flips customers.emailOptOut

column4: Visitor-keyed memory + shared product matcher + intent expansion
column6: Memory persisted to {persona}_chat_messages with visitor_key + role + content + turn_index | 1-year cookie or hashed IP for visitor identity | GPT-5 default; 50-message history; 4000 output-token budget | Intent expansion maps soft queries (boy/girl/pink/superhero) to product tags | Greeting includes holiday detection | PII scrubbed before storage | SAME product-search matcher as customer-facing search — never let them drift | Read-only Q&A (no booking/payment from chat)

column4: partner_outreach table + admin UI + branched pitch templates
column6: Status enum: not_contacted | contacted | replied | link_placed | rejected | Templates branched on organization_type (parks / corporate / schools / churches / daycares) | Bulk select-all + send-N with 600ms throttle | COI send button for orgs needing insurance attachment | Pitch templates pre-seeded in server/production-migration.ts
